title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Code Llama, and 50+ other models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration and a built-in model registry.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical API surface to the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: First-party LangChain integration; drop-in LLM, chat, and embeddings components powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, multi-model chats, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive (RxJava) APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and delete models from any Ruby script or Rails app.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive, coloured CLI REPL with conversation history, model switching, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection, PVC, and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & CUDA) with multi-arch support and docker-compose examples for quick local or cloud deployment.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed chat, embeddings, and model management APIs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering async/tokio bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single Docker Compose stack.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model in Discord threads with per-server model configs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for Q&A, summarization, and note generation using local models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama models as slash commands or DM chatbots.

title: ollama-nest
summary: Official NestJS module providing injectable Ollama service with async options and observables.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that supports multiple concurrent Ollama models, chat history export, and voice input via browser.
